title: pilosella bauhini subsp. graeca
intro: Pilosella bauhini subsp. graeca is a subspecies of the Pilosella bauhini plant, commonly known as a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella bauhini subsp. graeca include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
